title: Antidaphne schottii
taxonomy: Antidaphne schottii is classified as a species within the family Ericaceae. This family is commonly known as the heath or heather family. It is further classified as belonging to the genus Antidaphne. The genus Antidaphne is a group of flowering plants native to tropical Asia. Antidaphne schottii is a unique species within this genus and family.
